governingBody: List of books confiscated for violating Criminal Code 86, 86a, 130 or 130a authorities
reasonSummary: Confiscated by the Darmstadt Regional Court in March 2018. Unofficial title translation: The Chemistry of Auschwitz - The Technology and Toxicology of Zyklon B and the Gas Chambers - A Crime Scene Investigation
